analysis.consistency: High. The spell adheres to standard D&D 5e formatting and structure for a spell description.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, well-defined, and establishes clear mechanical limitations (5 questions, knowledge limitations, truthfulness based on relationship, 10-day restriction). The material component adds appropriate flavor.

mechanics.level_appropriateness: Appropriate for a 3rd-level spell, offering significant utility (information gathering) balanced by strict limitations (condition of the corpse, number of questions, ephemeral knowledge).
mechanics.casting_time_range_duration: Standard and suitable for an investigation/utility spell.
mechanics.components_assessment: The material component (burning incense) is flavorful and consumable, fitting for necromantic magic.
mechanics.core_functionality: Excellent utility. The restriction that the spirit knows only what it knew in life and cannot speculate prevents abuse for solving current mysteries or predicting the future, keeping it balanced.
mechanics.restrictions_and_caveats: The caveats regarding hostility affecting truthfulness and the inability to learn new information are crucial balancing factors and are well-articulated.

suggestions: None required. The spell is mechanically sound and flavorful as presented.
